name: The Cat API
description: Cat images, breed data, and a voting/favouriting platform — 60,000+ images across 67 breeds.
longDescription: The Cat API provides access to over 60,000 cat images, 67 cat breeds with detailed information (temperament, origin, adaptability, energy level, intelligence), and a voting/favoriting system. It's the cat equivalent of The Dog API and shares a similar data structure. Widely used for animal welfare apps, entertainment, ML training data, and developer demos.
pricing: Free: unlimited with free API key
affiliateText: Cat content goes viral! Deploy your cat app on Netlify with zero config.
